name: stork
description: Self-hosted email client with IMAP sync, local storage, and full-text search

scripts.test: vitest run tests/api.test.ts tests/api-edge-cases.test.ts tests/api-bulk.test.ts tests/imap-sync.test.ts tests/imap-sync-integration.test.ts tests/imap-sync-edge-cases.test.ts tests/imap-sync-labels.test.ts tests/smtp-send.test.ts tests/search.test.ts tests/search-advanced.test.ts tests/sync-scheduler.test.ts tests/connection-pool.test.ts tests/connection-pool-advanced.test.ts tests/db.test.ts tests/crypto.test.ts tests/encryption-lifecycle.test.ts && cd frontend && bun run test
scripts.test:backend: vitest run tests/api.test.ts tests/api-edge-cases.test.ts tests/api-bulk.test.ts tests/imap-sync.test.ts tests/imap-sync-integration.test.ts tests/imap-sync-edge-cases.test.ts tests/imap-sync-labels.test.ts tests/smtp-send.test.ts tests/search.test.ts tests/search-advanced.test.ts tests/sync-scheduler.test.ts tests/connection-pool.test.ts tests/connection-pool-advanced.test.ts tests/db.test.ts tests/crypto.test.ts tests/encryption-lifecycle.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run --coverage tests/api.test.ts tests/api-edge-cases.test.ts tests/api-bulk.test.ts tests/imap-sync.test.ts tests/imap-sync-integration.test.ts tests/imap-sync-edge-cases.test.ts tests/imap-sync-labels.test.ts tests/smtp-send.test.ts tests/search.test.ts tests/search-advanced.test.ts tests/sync-scheduler.test.ts tests/connection-pool.test.ts tests/connection-pool-advanced.test.ts tests/db.test.ts tests/crypto.test.ts tests/encryption-lifecycle.test.ts
